vocab.meaning: sự sáng tạo không bị gò bó/giới hạn
vocab.example: Being an artist would allow for unfettered creativity, enabling me to express ideas without the constraints of a typical corporate structure.

vocab.meaning: một phương tiện để biểu đạt bản thân
vocab.example: I believe that painting serves as a profound medium for self-expression, capturing emotions that words often fail to convey.

vocab.meaning: sự thỏa mãn về mặt thẩm mỹ
vocab.example: Working in a studio all day might bring a great deal of aesthetic fulfillment, especially when a vision finally comes to life on canvas.

vocab.meaning: khơi gợi những cảm xúc sâu sắc
vocab.example: The most compelling part of being an artist is the ability to evoke deep emotions in a complete stranger through a single piece of work.

vocab.meaning: sự chính trực/giữ vững bản sắc trong nghệ thuật
vocab.example: Maintaining artistic integrity can be challenging when you have to balance your personal vision with market demands.

vocab.meaning: một sự theo đuổi/công việc đơn độc
vocab.example: While art is often a solitary pursuit, the introspection involved can lead to significant personal growth.
I’ve always been fascinated by visual storytelling, and being an artist would give me the tools to master that craft.

vocab.meaning: vượt qua những giới hạn thông thường
vocab.example: Modern artists often push the boundaries of traditional techniques to create something entirely avant-garde.

vocab.meaning: tạo được sự đồng cảm/kết nối với khán giả
vocab.example: It would be incredibly rewarding to produce a sculpture that truly resonates with the audience on a visceral level.

vocab.meaning: một nghề nghiệp bấp bênh (về tài chính)
vocab.example: Despite the allure, being a full-time painter is often a precarious profession with an unpredictable income stream.
